raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "A 2024 Centers for Disease Control and Prevention study found that 9-out-of-10 middle school and high school students who currently use e-cigarettes prefer flavored products.",
    "Illegal flavored e-cigarettes comprise 39.8% of total e-cigarette sales in California.",
    "Disposable e-cigarettes represent 90.9% of sales of prohibited flavored e-cigarettes in California.",
    "In 2024, 18.9% of California tobacco retailers still sold tobacco to underage buyers.",
    "More effective retail licensing enforcement will reduce the availability of flavored tobacco products and prevent young people from getting addicted to tobacco.",
    "Tobacco use is tied to over 12 types of cancer, including lung cancer."
  ]
